summary: MANUTRIX Iteration 12 - Audit Remediation Testing Complete. All 6 fixes verified: (1) KPI Prev/Corr% now uses ALL OS showing 20%/60% (not 100%/0%), (2) Conformidade% excludes pending inspections, (3) Trend data has is_estimated flag with visible 'Dados estimados nos meses sem histórico' label, (4) Edit/Delete buttons admin-only on OS/Estoque/Sobressalentes with confirmation dialog, (5) Supervisor password restored (supervisor123 works), (6) OS list 500 error fixed. Backend: 22/22 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 verified all 6 audit remediation fixes. KPI calculations in server.py lines 1907-1954 now use all_os for prev/corr% and insp_finalizadas (excluding pending) for conformidade. Trend endpoint at line 2082 returns is_estimated flag. Frontend App.js lines 2085-2099 display estimated labels. RBAC for edit/delete is at lines 2667 (OS), 2944 (Estoque), 3840 (Sobressalentes) - all check user?.role === 'admin'. ConfirmDialog component at line 204. Supervisor password confirmed working via both backend test and curl.
